pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 23-24 create directory, line 124 creates file at $PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_login.xml
setup_task.sh lines 25 create directory, lines 91-98 create file at $PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml

Task description states 'Increase their height to at least 48dp'. Verifier.py line 142 checks: if height_val >= 48 or min_height_val >= 48. Initial state has 40dp (setup_task.sh lines 149, 160, 183). Android accessibility guidelines recommend 48dp minimum touch target size.
All five views are present in setup_task.sh lines 124-191: img_logo (lines 134-142), et_email (lines 146-154), et_password (lines 157-166), tv_forgot_pass (lines 169-177), btn_login (lines 180-188)
setup_task.sh: btn_login layout_height="40dp" (line 183), et_email layout_height="40dp" (line 149), et_password layout_height="40dp" (line 160)
setup_task.sh lines 134-142: img_logo element has no android:contentDescription attribute
setup_task.sh lines 146-154: et_email element has no android:autofillHints attribute
setup_task.sh lines 146-154: et_email element has no android:inputType attribute (task description requires setting it to textEmailAddress)

setup_task.sh line 174: tv_forgot_pass has android:textColor="#AAAAAA". Color luma calculation: RGB(170,170,170), Luma = 0.299*170 + 0.587*170 + 0.114*170 = 170. Verifier requires luma < 50 for acceptable contrast.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Android project (AccessAll) created with specific accessibility violations in app/src/main/res/layout/activity_login.xml. Five UI views are present with confirmed violations: btn_login, et_email, and et_password have touch target heights of 40dp (violating 48dp minimum); img_logo lacks android:contentDescription; et_email lacks android:autofillHints and android:inputType attributes; tv_forgot_pass has text color #AAAAAA (luma=170, failing contrast requirement of luma<50). The project structure, layout file path, strings file path, and minimum height requirement of 48dp are all accurately configured.
